case_title: LEASECOMM CORPORATION VS. JOSE MARIO HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE MARIO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE MARIO $1,753.97 PRINCIPAL, $2,019.56 INTEREST, $156.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,929.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
